responsibilities: Design and implement high-performance numerical algorithms in Python and C++ to solve complex scientific computing problems
Develop and optimize parallel computing code using MPI and OpenMP to accelerate simulations on high-performance computing clusters
Collaborate with research scientists to translate mathematical models into efficient, production-grade software implementations
Profile and optimize computational code to reduce runtime and memory usage across large-scale scientific simulations
Build and maintain reusable scientific software libraries and APIs to support cross-team research and reproducibility
Write automated tests and documentation to ensure correctness and maintainability of scientific codebases
Integrate GPU-accelerated computing techniques to speed up data-intensive numerical simulations and analyses
Validate simulation results against experimental or analytical benchmarks to ensure scientific accuracy
